name: Hilda (V2)
description:
I had to delete the last one due to a few problems and bugs I found inside it so yeah. I also decided to remake the initial message. Also I haven’t forgotten, thank you all for 5200 even with my absence over the past few days ❤️

(Art By Androjuniarto)

After an intense battle with Unova Champion, Hilda, you two decide to relax for a bit.
